prestazioni: F6A turbocharged 657cc inline-3 engine (engine code: F6A-T) upgraded with a Garrett GT12 turbocharger (GT1241Z, 0.35 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and HKS Hi-Power exhaust system (4-2-1 header configuration) to optimize spool and reduce backpressure for a 30% power increase (target: 110 HP at 7,500 RPM with 98 RON fuel).

Full standalone Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with custom wiring harness (PnP adapter for F6A-T) running a 4D ignition map and individual cylinder fuel trims, paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft (lift: 8.5mm, duration: 260°) and Supertech titanium retainers to handle 8,500 RPM redline safely.

Custom aluminum radiator (Koyorad 1.3x core thickness) with dual 12-inch SPAL fans, Mishimoto silicone hoses (AN-6 fittings), and a Setrab 19-row oil cooler (front-mount) to maintain 85°C oil temps under track use, paired with a Nismo 550cc/min high-pressure fuel pump and ID1000 injectors for E85 compatibility.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 Alto Works-specific widebody kit (front fenders: +50mm, rear quarter panels: +70mm) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (1.5mm thickness) and a 3-piece aluminum rear diffuser (integrated tow hook) for improved aero balance (target: -15% lift at 120 km/h).

Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 15mm lower than stock) with custom spring rates (front: 8kg/mm, rear: 6kg/mm) and spherical bearing top mounts (SuperPro) for razor-sharp turn-in, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 20mm rear adjustable sway bars (3-position).

Recaro Pole Position II seats (Alcantara/Suede, 15kg weight savings per seat) with custom aluminum mounting brackets (direct bolt-on for Alto chassis) and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, paired with a Nardi 350mm Classic steering wheel (suede, 5mm offset) and NRG quick-release hub for improved ergonomics and driver feedback.
